cases.expect: Invokes the skill; runs scripts/wbr.py for the current week; presents the summary and mentions the snapshot/dashboard.

cases.prompt: How did this week go across my channels?
cases.expect: Invokes the skill; runs wbr.py; leads with what moved vs last week (deltas), not a raw dump.

cases.prompt: Give me the weekly stats for the week of July 6
cases.expect: Runs wbr.py --week 2026-07-06 (any date inside that ISO week is acceptable).
Starts npm run dev in projects/weekly-business-review and gives the localhost URL.

cases.prompt: How many LinkedIn leads replied this week?
cases.expect: Does NOT invent a number. Explains the CRMs only track New/Sent, replies aren't recorded, and offers the sent/added counts (or adding stage columns) instead.

cases.prompt: How many tasks did I complete this week?
cases.expect: If ProductivityHub creds are absent, says the section is not configured and names the two env vars needed, rather than guessing.

cases.prompt: Write me a LinkedIn post about AI automation
cases.expect: Does NOT invoke this skill (content creation belongs to post-creator/content-engine).
